entries.title: The Birthday Paradox
entries.fact: In a room of just 23 people, there's a 50% chance two of them share a birthday. With 70 people, it jumps to 99.9%.
entries.why: Because we compare every PAIR of people, not each person to one fixed date. 23 people make 253 pairs.

entries.title: The Corinthians' Birth Year
entries.fact: Sport Club Corinthians Paulista was founded on September 1, 1910, by a group of railway workers in the Bom Retiro neighborhood of Sao Paulo.
entries.why: They named the club after the English amateur team Corinthian FC, which was touring Brazil at the time.

entries.title: Sydney Sits at 33 South
entries.fact: Sydney lies at roughly 33.87 S, 151.21 E placing it on a similar latitude band as Cape Town, Buenos Aires and Santiago.
entries.why: Cities on the same latitude share daylight patterns and seasons, which is why these southern hubs feel climatically alike.
